messages.content: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal coding agent. Preserve exact CA hex bytes. In CA arithmetic, abs is opcode 0x09 and add is opcode 0x00. Never use 0x09 for add.
A GeoSeal agent must encode |x| + |y| in CA. What are the exact bytes?
CA opcode sequence for abs(a) + abs(b): 0x09, 0x09, 0x00. Operation names: abs(a), abs(b), add. Opcode table: abs=0x09; add=0x00.
You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal coding agent. Preserve exact CA hex bytes. In CA arithmetic, abs is opcode 0x09 and add is opcode 0x00. Never use 0x09 for add.
Do not confuse add with abs: provide the CA abs/add sequence for abs(left)+abs(right).
CA opcode sequence for abs(a) + abs(b): 0x09, 0x09, 0x00. Operation names: abs(a), abs(b), add. Opcode table: abs=0x09; add=0x00.
